title: Gap sticks with ‘90s nostalgia, denim for Hailey Bieber capsule campaign
description: The launch builds on the retailer’s recent success with advertising that brings together fashion, music and culture.

title: Retail Media’s Next Evolution: Getting Into Content
description: But some ad buyers wonder if branded content undermines the core value prop of driving sales.

title: WTF is LLM honeypotting?
description: Publishers and ecommerce brands under siege from AI crawlers are starting to fight back with an old security trick updated for the LLM era: “LLM honeypotting.”

title: ‘The store is a lemonade stand’: Brands are lending their retail spaces to other brands for events
description: Brands like P.F. Candle Co. and Sorbara’s are lending their physical spaces to other brands for guest pop-ups. The strategy helps lift foot traffic and offset real estate costs.

title: Sam’s Club takes Manhattan for wellness event with creators
description: On Thursday, Sam's Club hosted its first-ever Sam's Wellness Club, an exclusive event bringing together creators, media and merchants at a loft event space overlooking Midtown Manhattan. Here's why the club retailer is so keen on promoting its health and wellness offerings right now.

title: Walmart touts some of its lowest back-to-school pricing since 2019
description: The retailer’s value focus is similar to past years, with another food kit of $2 lunches and deals on the 14 most popular school supplies.

title: Foot Locker brings in Salomon to boost assortment
description: The athletics retailer is partnering with the France-based premium sneaker brand as parent company Dick’s pursues an extensive inventory refresh.

title: AI Makes Refund Evidence Easier to Fake
description:
Using AI, a fraudster can generate fabricated product images, adjust explanations, and repeat or even automate the process.
The post AI Makes Refund Evidence Easier to Fake appeared first on Practical Ecommerce.

title: Ecommerce Trends: 3 important ways online retailers are using AI in 2026
description:
Among the biggest trends shaping ecommerce in 2026, artificial intelligence (AI) plays prominent roles in many of them — and the ways in which online retailers use AI are changing as technology and strategies mature. From the shifts in approach to agentic commerce at OpenAI, Shopify, Walmart and elsewhere, to the collective realizations among retailers […]
The post Ecommerce Trends: 3 important ways online retailers are using AI in 2026 appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.

title: The state of agentic storefronts: How AI agents guide shoppers on frictionless, full-funnel journeys
description: This State of the Industry report, sponsored by Swap, explores how brands, retailers and agencies are adopting agentic commerce, including agentic storefronts, to enhance shopping experiences. Artificial intelligence is the new entry point in e-commerce, as more shoppers rely on AI-powered summaries and assistants to discover products. Beyond discovery and product recommendations, AI agents are […]

title: Marketplace Briefing: What’s driving a surge in Amazon sales for 3 startups
description: Amid a challenging macroeconomic year, Amazon has proven to be a powerful sales engine for many digitally native startups. Modern Retail spoke with three startups — Suri, P.F. Candle Co, and Pretty Tasty Tea – about what they believe is driving their surge in Amazon sales this year.

title: [AINews] Kimi K3 2.8T-A50B: the largest open model ever released; Opus 4.8-class at Sonnet 5 pricing
description: a great week for open models continues.

title: Publicis addresses LiveRamp deal, lagging Sapient arm as it raises outlook
description: Clients are viewing the $2.2 billion acquisition, which has raised questions around LiveRamp’s neutrality, as a “non-event,” executives said.

title: Best enterprise rank tracking software for high-traffic websites
description: The best enterprise rank-tracking software goes far beyond checking positions for a handful of keywords. At scale, it means monitoring millions of data points across devices, locations, and search features, including AI Overviews, featured snippets, and local packs. Then that intelligence is fed into dashboards, CRM workflows, and executive reports that drive action across large organizations.

title: 🔬 The Lab of the Future Should Feel Like a Data Center — Andy Beam & Rafa Gómez-Bombarelli, Lila Sciences
description: Lila is betting that science, not the internet, is the last untapped source of training data. We went to find out what that actually looks like in a room full of robots.
